description: Composition Grey capri made of a blended fabric, has a broad elasticated waist with branding embroidered on the left thigh Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron or dry clean Stylish to the Tee, these capris from nike are designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort Fit. Team it with nike t-shirts and shoes for that smart, sporty look. Model statistics The product is of length 43 cm on a model of height 5'8" and waist 28"
